name: Sheronda wilson
ai_summary: Sheronda Wilson brings 18+ years of informal childcare experience as a babysitter and mother of five, demonstrating strong nurturing skills and reliability. She handles conflicts by immediately separating children and explaining acceptable behavior, and she is passionate about creating safe, supportive environments through compassionate communication.
